content:
SYSTEM: Never silently select between plausible Arpent destinations.
USER: Save my cache invalidation framework. It came from the migration project, but I might want it as a reusable engineering resource.

text: This has two plausible homes: project-local material for the migration project, or a global reusable resource. Which should I choose? If it stands on its own beyond this migration, I recommend the resource; otherwise I will keep it with the project.
